site.title: Leandro Stanger - Portfolio
site.description: Professional portfolio of Leandro Stanger - Developer and Computer Engineering Student

cards.title: Academic Background
cards.text: Computer Engineering student at UNOPAR - Universidade Norte do Paraná. Constantly evolving in the technology field, always seeking new knowledge and challenges for professional growth.

cards.title: Passion for Technology
cards.text: Passionate about programming, technology and continuous learning. I believe technology has the power to transform the world and I seek to contribute to this transformation by developing innovative solutions.

cards.title: Jiu-jitsu & Discipline
cards.text: Jiu-jitsu practitioner, a sport that teaches me discipline, resilience and strategy - qualities I directly apply in software development and complex problem solving.

objetivo.title: Professional Objective
objetivo.text: Seeking a position in the IT field as a Java Developer, JavaScript Developer, C Developer or Database Analyst, where I can apply my knowledge in computer and network maintenance. I have been dedicated to studying Java, JavaScript and C (focusing on embedded systems, programming logic and performance), as well as the Spring ecosystem, Hibernate, Maven and front-end frameworks. I aim to become a qualified full-stack developer. I continue to develop skills in technical support, system administration, software development and database management.

areas.title: Developer
areas.text: Interested in working on web application and system development, using modern technologies and following best programming practices.

areas.title: Database
areas.text: I wish to work with database modeling, administration and optimization, ensuring system integrity and performance.

areas.title: Java / Mobile
areas.text: Interested in developing mobile applications (Android) and backend with Java, exploring the Spring ecosystem, good OOP practices and database integration.

areas.title: C Language
areas.text: Passionate about low-level programming, embedded systems, drivers and efficient algorithms. The C language gives me a deep understanding of memory, pointers and performance, being fundamental for my Computer Engineering education.

doacoes.title: Donations
doacoes.subtitle: Contribute to development
doacoes.intro:
Voluntary contributions directly help the continuity of my studies and the development of this project.
I am currently on an academic journey at Unopar University, constantly seeking to evolve in technology and development.
The support received contributes to the purchase of books, educational resources and helps with college costs.
It also allows me to invest in improving the project and creating new technological initiatives in the future.
Any contribution is very welcome and makes a difference in this journey of learning and evolution.
